Can Swift packages do webp decoding?

also known as: webp

Audio17 Images7 Media4 MIDI2 Networking9 Speech2 Storage14 Ui14 Video4 Voice1
PackageiOSmacOSwatchOStvOSvisionOSLinuxCatalyst
Kingfisher as of 8.10.0
Details
?

not verified yet · confidence 0.25 · as of 8.10.0

  • WebP needs the separate KingfisherWebP coder package — nothing in this package serves it
